JScience 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml

Uses of Package
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml

Packages that use org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml
Package
Description
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml
Systems Biology Markup Language (SBML) loader for JScience.
  • Classes in org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml used by org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml
    Class
    Description
    SBMLCompartment
    Represents a compartment in an SBML model.
    SBMLException
    Exception thrown when SBML parsing fails.
    SBMLGeneProduct
    Represents a gene product from the FBC extension.
    SBMLModel
    Represents an SBML model for systems biology.
    SBMLParameter
    Represents a global parameter in an SBML model.
    SBMLReaction
    Represents a reaction in an SBML model.
    SBMLSpecies
    Represents a species (metabolite) in an SBML model.
